manifest.claimBoundary: Synthetic browser-local public demonstration. No external audit, no production certification, no live settlement, no wallet connection, no user data, and no value moved.

candidates.name: Final answer only
candidates.summary: Looks polished but has no trace root, source provenance, tool scope, or contradiction pass.
candidates.reason: Final text is not process evidence.

candidates.name: Hidden tool path
candidates.summary: The answer may be useful, but tool use, retrieval steps, and data boundary are not inspectable.
candidates.reason: Hidden action path cannot become authority.

candidates.name: Trace present, contradiction unresolved
candidates.summary: The trace, claims, and sources exist, but one contradiction remains unresolved and rollback is incomplete.

candidates.name: Process-resolved proof trace
candidates.summary: Every material claim is linked to evidence, tool scope, validator status, risk ledger, contradiction pass, and receipt pointer.

traceLedger.rule: Final output is not enough. Each material process step must carry reason, scope, evidence, validation status, and rollback pointer.

steps.name: Mission Contract
steps.reason: Bind objective, acceptance criteria, risk class, and claim boundary before work begins.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Source Pass
steps.reason: Separate primary, secondary, derived, and uncertain sources before claims are accepted.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Tool Scope
steps.reason: Record what tools were allowed, blocked, used, and why.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Claim Lineage
steps.reason: Tie each material claim to evidence, process step, contradiction status, and uncertainty.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Contradiction Pass
steps.reason: Prevent unresolved counterevidence from becoming institutional default.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Process Validator
steps.reason: Validate process integrity, not just final wording.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Risk Ledger
steps.reason: Surface remaining risk, uncertainty, reversibility, and human authority boundary.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Receipt Pointer
steps.reason: Emit a public-safe receipt pointer without exposing private workpapers.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

claims.claim: Material claims are linked to evidence.
Tool actions stayed inside declared scope.
Human authority remains final for acceptance.

toolScope.boundary: Tools are simulated and browser-local in the public demo.

validatorReport.rule: Validate the work path, not only the final answer.

candidates.name: Final answer only
candidates.reason: Final text is not process evidence.

candidates.name: Hidden tool path
candidates.reason: Hidden action path cannot become authority.
